fix: add integrations.azure PAT to fix ADO scaffolder 401 (TF401444)

Without integrations.azure configured, DefaultAzureDevOpsCredentialsProvider
falls back to the Backstage managed-identity Bearer token. ADO rejects it
with TF401444 because the backstage SP has never signed in to the org via
a web browser.

Configure integrations.azure with personalAccessToken: ${ADO_PAT} so the
scaffolder actions (azure:project:ensure, azure:agentpool:ensure,
azure:pipeline:create-and-run) authenticate with a PAT instead.

Also add ADO_PAT to k8s/backstage-secrets.example.yaml so the field is
not missing from production deployments.

commit.message:
feat(cli): target-aware native link plan + explicit Darwin contract (#968)

* feat(cli): target-aware native link plan + explicit Darwin contract (#254)

Introduce NativeLinkPlan in target.rs to make every platform-specific
linker decision derive from the target TargetOs rather than the
compile-time host #[cfg] world.

### hew-cli/src/target.rs
- New NativeLinkPlan struct: gc_flags, strip_flags, platform_libs,
  needs_darwin_sdk, needs_windows_crt_fixup, needs_dsymutil.
- New TargetSpec::native_link_plan() returning the correct plan for
  Darwin, Linux, Windows, and WASM targets.
- 10 new unit tests covering all platform plan fields independently of
  the running host.

### hew-cli/src/link.rs
- link_executable uses target.native_link_plan() for all target-driven
  flag groups; #[cfg] blocks replaced by plan field dispatch:
  - plan.gc_flags / plan.strip_flags replaces the macos/unix cfg blocks.
  - plan.needs_darwin_sdk gates find_darwin_sdk() (new wrapper).
  - plan.needs_windows_crt_fixup gates the CRT override args.
  - plan.platform_libs replaces per-platform cfg lib blocks.
  - plan.needs_dsymutil gates run_dsymutil_for_darwin() (new wrapper).
- Host-driven sections (compiler/lld selection) explicitly labeled.
- FreeBSD fallback kept under #[cfg(target_os = "freebsd")] with a
  FOLLOW-UP note pending TargetOs::FreeBsd addition.

Behaviour preserved: identical linker invocations for all currently
supported targets. Darwin cross-arch (arm64 <-> x86_64) and same-arch
native links validated by e2e tests.

* fix copilot provider hooks to match cli docs

Copilot CLI loads hooks from <cwd>/.github/hooks/*.json, not
~/.copilot/config.json. The prior layout, schema, and payload
assumptions all contradicted the official docs, so hooks never ran —
the inspector timeline was empty and session state never transitioned.

Rewrites hook install to write <cwd>/.github/hooks/vibeyard-copilot-hooks.json
with the documented {version:1, hooks:{...}} schema and per-entry
bash+powershell fields. Adds a dispatcher script that writes .status
and .events keyed off VIBEYARD_SESSION_ID. Covers all seven Copilot
events (sessionStart, userPromptSubmitted, preToolUse, postToolUse,
errorOccurred, agentStop, sessionEnd). Installs hooks per-cwd at
spawnPty time since config is project-scoped.
